<!--
Conventional commit prefix in the title: feat / fix / chore / docs / refactor.
Map data corrections submitted via the editor end with `Pulsemap-*` git
trailers — leave them intact so they ride into the squash-merge commit.
-->

## Type

<!-- Pick one -->
- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, deps, CI
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — internal change, no behavior change
- [ ] map correction (auto-generated by the editor)

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences. What changed and why. -->

## Test plan

<!--
A bulleted checklist of what you verified. Include commands you ran
(`bun test`, `bun run typecheck`, `bun run lint`, manual browser checks).
-->

- [ ] 

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. "Closes #42" — optional. -->
